mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moments (user_id, content, media, media_type, visibility) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{media}, #{mediaType}, #{visibility})
INSERT IGNORE INTO moment_likes (moment_id, user_id) VALUES (#{momentId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM moment_likes WHERE moment_id = #{momentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moment_comments (moment_id, user_id, reply_to_user_id, content) VALUES (#{momentId}, #{userId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE moment_comments SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE moments SET visibility = #{visibility} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM moment_comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR reply_to_user_id = #{userId}
